author: driver--design-phase-5-platform-md-460e
content: Result: Implemented vitreous_platform with 7 source files (lib.rs + 6 modules), 44 passing tests, clean clippy and fmt. Covers REQ-1 through REQ-10: WindowConfig + PlatformWindow (winit 0.30), CosmicTextEngine (cosmic-text 0.18), PlatformDialogs (rfd 0.17), PlatformClipboard (arboard 3.6), PlatformInfo, and DesktopRuntime with full event loop pipeline (winit events → vitreous events → reactive → layout → render → a11y).
